behavior_summary: U8P_CUP::look handles the 'U8P_CUP::look' (examine) event for the cup item. When an actor examines the cup it sets an info/state marker on the object (info id 0x0208), then constructs the short name string "cup ", calls Item::bark to present that short description to the examining actor, frees the temporary string, and then suspends/returns.
The call to Item::bark is the visible effect: it causes the cup to 'bark' the text "cup " to the provided actor/process (the viewer).
The function performs small bookkeeping (implies/pop sequence) typical of Usecode/engine handlers before finishing; no persistent global flags are read or written by this script.
notable_control_flow: Entry on Event 0 (U8P_CUP::look) with a caller/actor pid parameter passed at BP+06h.
Set info operation is performed with constant 0x0208 and a process-exclude step (marking or adjusting object processing state).
Dynamically allocate/construct the literal string "cup ", push it and the caller pid to Item::bark, capture the returned value (retval).
Free the constructed string, push retval, perform an implies/pop control bookkeeping sequence, then suspend/return the process.
open_questions: Precise semantic meaning of info id 0x0208 (what object state/flag it represents) — inferred only from opcode usage.
Whether the process-exclude/set-info step changes long-term processing of the cup or is purely transient bookkeeping.
Exact effects and interpretation of the Item::bark return value (stored in retval) and how it influences the enclosing script beyond being pushed before suspend.

main_function.name: U8P_CUP::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to an actor looking at/examining the cup: mark/set an info flag on the item, and display its short name "cup " to the examining actor via Item::bark, then finish.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_CUP::look) — triggered when an actor examines or 'looks' at the cup
Caller/actor pid supplied as parameter at BP+06h

function_map.name: U8P_CUP::look
function_map.role: Handles the U8P_CUP::look/examine event for the cup object; performs set-info, builds a short-name string and invokes Item::bark to show it to the viewer.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item service used to present short text/bark from the item to a target process/player (used to display "cup ").

external_calls.purpose: Display or emit the short name/description string "cup " to the actor/process that examined the item (pid passed from BP+06h).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_CUP::look handles the 'U8P_CUP::look' (examine) event for the cup item. When an actor examines the cup it sets an info/state marker on the object (info id 0x0208), then constructs the short name string "cup ", calls Item::bark to present that short description to the examining actor, frees the temporary string, and then suspends/returns.
